Package com.dropbox.core.v2.teamlog

Class RansomwareRestoreProcessCompletedDetails

java.lang.Object
com.dropbox.core.v2.teamlog.RansomwareRestoreProcessCompletedDetails
public class RansomwareRestoreProcessCompletedDetails extends Object
Completed ransomware restore process.

  • Constructor Details

    • RansomwareRestoreProcessCompletedDetails

      public RansomwareRestoreProcessCompletedDetails(@Nonnull String status, long restoredFilesCount, long restoredFilesFailedCount)
      Completed ransomware restore process.
      Parameters:
      status - The status of the restore process. Must not be null.
      restoredFilesCount - Restored files count.
      restoredFilesFailedCount - Restored files failed count.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If any argument does not meet its preconditions.
